name: PM-KISAN Income Support (Sample Record)
description: Sample catalogue record for landholding farmer families to check income-support eligibility on the official portal.

benefit.description: Annual income support, subject to current scheme rules and exclusions.

other_conditions: Landholding and exclusion criteria are verified on the official portal.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample is relevant when the profile identifies a landholding farmer.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm landholding and exclusion rules on the official portal.

source.organization: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

name: PMFBY Crop Insurance (Sample Record)
description: Sample catalogue record for farmers seeking crop-insurance information and enrollment guidance.

benefit.description: Coverage and premium depend on notified crops, area, and season.

other_conditions: Crop and season must be notified in the relevant area.

ai_explanation.summary: This sample applies to farmers looking for notified crop insurance.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Check notified crop and location details on the portal.

source.organization: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
